Seri Lestari Energy Berhad PDPA and MNPI Handling Notice for employees, contractors, and investors in Malaysia.
We collect and process personal data under the Personal Data Protection Act 2010, including contact details, employment records, device identifiers, and onboarding checks relating directly or indirectly to an identifiable data subject.
For Bursa Malaysia disclosure readiness and financing activities, selected teams may handle non-public information that could materially affect the price or value of our listed securities under the CMSA; such MNPI must be kept confidential.
An insider list is maintained for the proposed sustainability-linked sukuk and the tokenised carbon credits pilot; individuals listed must observe blackout windows and refrain from tipping or selective disclosure.
Information barriers apply between our Treasury Digital Assets unit and Investor Relations, with access restricted via separate systems, badge zones, and need-to-know approvals by Encik Farid Zakaria, Head of Compliance.
Cyber security incident data, including logs of attempted intrusions and wallet key rotation events, is treated as confidential MNPI where linked to operational continuity or valuation impacts.
Commercial terms for the private cloud security contract (including breach indemnity caps and ESG monitoring service fees) are non-public until formal Bursa announcements; sharing outside authorised deal teams is prohibited.
We use third-country processors, including a hosted archive in Singapore and an analytics provider in Brunei, subject to PDPA transfer safeguards and written data processing agreements.
Data subjects may submit access, correction, or withdrawal-of-consent requests by emailing privacy@serilestari.com.my or writing to Puan Noraini Salleh, Data Protection Officer, Seri Lestari Energy Berhad, Menara Sutera 12, Persiaran Bayu, Kuala Lumina 50999, Malaysia.
We aim to respond to DSAR requests within 21 days; where requests intersect with MNPI, we may defer or redact details to comply with Bursa listing requirements and the CMSA.
Retention: personnel files up to 7 years post-employment; deal-room audit trails 10 years; crypto wallet access logs 5 years; and ESG impact survey responses 3 years, unless legal or regulatory hold applies.
Educational and marketing communications may mention ESG, cyber security, or crypto concepts for general awareness, but they do not include transaction specifics or price-sensitive content.
We will notify affected persons of any material personal data breach in accordance with SC and Bursa guidance and maintain breach records for compliance audits.
Requests regarding MNPI wall-crossing for the green energy acquisition are to be submitted via compliance@serilestari.com.my; approvals will be recorded on the insider list with timestamps.
By continuing your engagement with us, you acknowledge this notice and agree to abide by our information barrier protocols and PDPA consent terms, which do not waive your statutory rights.
